title: Reserved for Ladies
writer: Lajos Biró, Eliot Crawshay-Williams, Ernest Vajda
actors: Leslie Howard, George Grossmith, Benita Hume
plot: Falling in love with the aristocratic Sylvia Robertson (Elizabeth Allen), Max poses as a European prince, enlisting the aid of an amiable Ruritanian monarch (Lawrence Grossmith) who owes him a favor.
